hero.title: AI Creative Studio
hero.subtitle: Exploring the boundless possibilities of AI and visual art — a portfolio of AI animation dramas, live-action shorts, concept trailers, and creative visuals

ai-animation-drama.label: AI Animation Drama
ai-animation-drama.description: AI-generated animation-style narrative works that blend manga storyboarding with dynamic motion, creating immersive anime storytelling experiences

ai-live-drama.label: AI Live-Action Short Drama

ai-concept-trailer.label: AI Concept Trailer
ai-concept-trailer.description: Cinematic concept trailers produced with AI tools, showcasing visual creativity and narrative vision in short-form format

ai-creative-short.label: AI Creative Short
ai-creative-short.description: Experimental AI short-form videos exploring the limitless possibilities of AI in visual art, music visualization, and abstract storytelling

ai-image-art.label: AI Image Art
ai-image-art.description: High-quality AI-generated artwork created with Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, and other tools, spanning diverse styles and themes

about.title: About Me
about.description:
I am an AI visual creator dedicated to producing high-quality visual content using AI technologies. From AI animation dramas to live-action shorts, from cinematic concept trailers to exquisite AI image art, I explore the fusion of artificial intelligence and creative expression.

This portfolio primarily features works created with **domestic Chinese AI tools** — Jimeng AI, Doubao, CapCut Pro, LiblibAI — alongside Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, and ComfyUI. Each piece represents the intersection of AI technology and human creativity, demonstrating the revolutionary potential of generative AI in the realm of visual storytelling.
about.followMeHint: Follow my latest works on these platforms
about.contactHint: If you are interested in my work or have collaboration opportunities, feel free to reach out. I am currently looking for job opportunities in AI animation drama and AI short drama.

entries.title: Software Testing
entries.description: Software functional testing, compatibility testing, and UX testing. Authored test cases, performed smoke and regression testing, tracked defect lifecycle, and delivered test reports.

entries.title: E-commerce Operations
entries.description: Managed product listings, page optimization, and daily operations on platforms including JD.com and Government Cloud Marketplace. Maintained product data accuracy, monitored platform metrics, and coordinated operational adjustments around promotion cycles.
